title: Sage Design System – UI Framework from Kajabi
content: Sage from Directories: Components: Sage Design System serves as the source of truth, offering all necessary resources to craft exceptional experiences for Kajabi entrepreneurs. It comprises meticulously crafted design principles, guidelines, and reusable components. Design System provides a centralized hub of assets and documentation, fostering collaboration and consistency. Sage empowers creators to effectively share their knowledge and passion, driving success in the digital. Color System Repository Icons Storybook Typography Accordion Action bar Alert banner Avatar Badges Breadcrumb Button Cards Checkbox Data table Divider Drawer Dropdown Empty state Icon Label Link List Modal Page header Pagination Popover Progress bar Progress indicator Radio button Search Sidebar Snackbar Switch Tabs Tag Text field Tooltip
